description: Daisy, Fitz, and Simmons encounter Deke, whose allegiance remains questionable. He insists he's there to help them escape and proposes a route via the service shafts. Their tense exchange reflects concerns over trust and the urgency to flee the Kree.

transcript.line: You don't know nothing about me, either.
Well, you're not the first person to tell me that. I'm not here to tell you anything you don't already know. I'm just... Well, I'm just here. If you need me.
Yeah. Well, it never is. I lost people, too, it doesn't ever get easier.
Thought you weren't gonna tell me something I didn't already know. Maybe I should just turn myself in, stop more people from dying.
No. You have a gift now. You can help people, protect them.
“Protect them.” I couldn't protect Tess. Couldn't protect my parents. What happens if I can't protect you, either?
